name: Windows VM
postCreateCommand:
#!/bin/bash
                        set -e
                        sudo apt update
                        sudo apt install docker.io docker-compose -y
                        sudo systemctl start docker
                        sudo systemctl enable docker
                        
                        printf '%s\n' 'services:' '  windows:' '    image: dockurr/windows' '    container_name: windows' '    environment:' '      VERSION: "10"' '    devices:' '      - /dev/kvm' '      - /dev/net/tun' '    cap_add:' '      - NET_ADMIN' '    ports:' '      - "8006:8006"' '      - "3389:3389"' '    volumes:' '      - ./windows:/storage' '    restart: always' > docker-compose.yml
                        sudo docker compose up -d
                        sleep 10
                        
                        curl -L https://github.com/ekzhang/bore/releases/download/v0.5.0/bore-v0.5.0-x86_64-unknown-linux-musl.tar.gz | tar -xz
                        sudo mv bore /usr/local/bin/
                        
                        cat > /etc/systemd/system/bore-3389.service << EOF
                        [Unit]
                        Description=Bore tunnel for RDP port 3389
                        After=network.target
                        [Service]
                        Type=simple
                        User=root
                        ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/bore local 3389 --to bore.pub
                        Restart=always
                        RestartSec=10
                        [Install]
                        WantedBy=multi-user.target
                        EOF
                        
                        cat > /etc/systemd/system/bore-8006.service << EOF
                        [Unit]
                        Description=Bore tunnel for Web port 8006
                        After=network.target
                        [Service]
                        Type=simple
                        User=root
                        ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/bore local 8006 --to bore.pub
                        Restart=always
                        RestartSec=10
                        [Install]
                        WantedBy=multi-user.target
                        EOF
                        
                        sudo systemctl daemon-reload
                        sudo systemctl enable bore-3389.service
                        sudo systemctl enable bore-8006.service
                        sudo systemctl start bore-3389.service
                        sudo systemctl start bore-8006.service
                        
                        sleep 10
                        echo "Setup completed successfully"
